detail: 5 executive dashboards across sales, ROB, PACE, and productivity — each one killed a recurring manual ritual. Revenue leadership now runs on live intelligence, not one-off pulls.
Migrated sales reporting to a new analytics platform. Redesigned core business views, validated reporting logic, eliminated manual Excel refresh cycles across the portfolio.
Co-led the FY2026–27 annual operating plan. Data logic, finance alignment, source-segment validation. All planning files delivered on schedule.
Cost allocation framework for a contract manufacturer. For the first time, leadership could see which SKUs actually made money.
Power BI dashboard with cross-functional teams. Automated a manual monthly ritual. The team spent that time on analysis instead.
Streamlined financial reporting for an FMCG client. Less time closing the books meant more time understanding what the numbers said.
Google Apps Script automation on the shop floor. Wrote the code, trained the team, watched the repetitive work disappear. 1,000+ users affected.
Led an 8-member team to redesign the plant permit system. Cut approval time, removed the bottleneck, and made safety compliance faster than the old paper process.
Formalised 20+ installation and maintenance SOPs across 4 capital projects. When the documentation is right, the execution follows.
